title: Phase 1.4: Metrics, Stats & A/B Test Validation
context: Implement metrics to measure learning system effectiveness. Create LearningStatsCalculator, add GET /api/learning/stats endpoint with A/B test results, statistical significance testing, health monitoring, CLI analysis tool. See detailed spec in docs/handoffs/learning-phase-1.4-metrics-validation.md. Depends on Phases 1.1-1.3. Completes Milestone 1.
acceptance: 1) LearningStatsCalculator implemented. 2) GET /api/learning/stats endpoint with full A/B analysis. 3) GET /api/learning/top-learnings endpoint. 4) GET /api/learning/health endpoint. 5) Statistical significance testing with Chi-squared. 6) CLI tool: python app/cli/analyze_learning.py (stats/top/health). 7) scipy added to requirements.txt. 8) Stats calculation <500ms. 9) Unit tests >80% coverage. 10) Integration tests for all endpoints. 11) Health checks detect common issues.
